infoFacts.message: desktop capture proved actual WebGPU backend with WebGPU-native feature facts.

facts: search is shown by interruption and absence, not by tools or people
grid gaps may be more important than filled cells
spread stays concentrated rather than all-over noise
visibleAbsence.rationale: The selected news calls for low intensity and concentrated spread; interruption patterns preserve abstraction and measured pacing.

plannedPart.intent: Translate the strange search operation into a square grid of repeated interruptions, omissions, and concentrated missing cells distributed through depth.

infoFacts.message: desktop capture proved actual WebGPU backend with WebGPU-native feature facts.

webgpuFeatureFacts.surface: InstancedMesh MeshBasicMaterial BufferGeometry with UVs and vertex colors

facts: animation may be absent if it reduces artist fidelity
no motion is required for the piece to read
effects remain subordinate to matte material and edge relationships
visibleAbsence.rationale: The motion packet explicitly permits static fallback when movement would make the artist language less faithful or less readable.

plannedPart.intent: Own optional steady-grid-pulse motion for selected interruptions or bars, using low-intensity deterministic timing and preserving a readable still composition.
plannedPart.messagePurpose: Own optional steady-grid-pulse motion for selected interruptions or bars, using low-intensity deterministic timing and preserving a readable still composition.
plannedPart.visualTarget: Own optional steady-grid-pulse motion for selected interruptions or bars, using low-intensity deterministic timing and preserving a readable still composition.
plannedPart.relationshipToWhole: It can lightly animate the interruption grid or scattered bars to express measured news pace, but the composition must stand without it.

compositionEvidence.summary: Attempt 1 assembles accepted WebGPU-compatible parts into a shallow frontal field with dominant blue void, paper/yellow/orange interval structure, right-side interruption grids, and restrained matte surface treatment.
decisions: Canonical camera retained for the first fixed design-view attempt.
Part transforms cluster accepted modules into one shallow construction rather than the default diagonal spread.
Right-side grid and motion parts are reduced in scale to keep concentrated search rhythm subordinate.
Lighting and outputColorTransform are subtle final readability controls, not a substitute for geometry.

takeaways: Use a fixed design camera and only revise projection after desktop/mobile preview evidence.
Keep one light output grade with no double tone-map or post-processing dependency.
Validate through the required Playwright desktop and mobile captures.

image.altText: News recap: Garcia is no longer the Red Devils' coach | The King's speech for the National Day | A strange search operation by Ellsworth Kelly.
